CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num;
SELECT quantileTDigest(0.5)(num) OVER (PARTITION BY num % 2) FROM test_numbers;
CREATE TABLE test_dates (d Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY d;
CREATE TABLE test_datetime (dt DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY dt;
SELECT q1, q2 FROM (SELECT quantileTDigest(0.5)(num) AS q1 FROM test_numbers) AS t1 JOIN (SELECT quantileTDigest(0.75)(num) AS q2 FROM test_numbers) AS t2;
SELECT num, quantileTDigest(0.5)(num) OVER (ORDER BY num ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_median FROM test_numbers;
SELECT quantileTDigest(0.5)(num) FROM (SELECT num FROM test_numbers WHERE num > 5) AS subquery;
SELECT quantileTDigest(0.5)(num) FROM test_numbers UNION ALL SELECT quantileTDigest(0.5)(num) FROM test_combined;
